financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made a lot more money this year compared to last year, thanks to strong sales of its vehicles.
They are also planning to grow and improve their operations, with no major financial problems reported.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well despite high costs for materials like aluminum and copper.
They are waiting for more information on tariffs, which could affect their costs and pricing.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment.
There is room for improvement in how the company handles social issues.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial results and market position.
They highlighted steady growth in sales and market share, especially in their Royal Enfield products.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company is clear about some things like profits and growth plans, but not about future sales abroad.
They sometimes use specific numbers to explain, but not always, which makes it hard to fully understand their plans.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing very well, with strong sales and profits, making the leaders confident about the future.
Even though there are some challenges with exports, the company plans to grow and keep doing well in the local market.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Eicher Motors is doing well in India with strong sales and new products, making it a good choice to buy.
There are some risks with international sales and expansion plans, but the company is still growing overall.
